content: Protein powders often contain low bioavailability ingredients like pea, rice, or soy protein, which can be difficult to digest.
Plant-based protein powders frequently include gums, fillers, and emulsifiers such as guar gum and xanthan gum that can irritate the gut.
Beef protein isolates, derived from grass-fed cows, are rich in collagen, gelatin, and complete amino acids, supporting gut repair and muscle recovery.
Beef protein isolates are free from lactose, fillers, gums, and fake sweeteners that commonly cause bloating and digestive issues.
Consuming beef-based protein can lead to improved digestion, reduced bloating, and enhanced overall gut health compared to plant-based alternatives.
Women experiencing bloating, inconsistent digestion, or gut-related issues should consider switching to a clean, beef-based protein alternative.
